The '''Loratus Hover Transport TC9''' was a cargo vehicle.

==Characteristics==
[[File:JKAship_transport.png|left|202x202px|thumb|A common mercenary model.]]

The TC9 was manufactured by [[Loratus Manufacturing]] and was a hover vehicle capable of fast speeds. This armored troop transport had front-mounted anti-armor blasters, and could carry up to six troopers.

==History==
{{Quote|Kyle, the evac ships are standing by. Just keep those prisoners alive!|Jan Ors to Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>}}
It was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and a group of smugglers and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] affiliated with the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], later in the war. The transports were later used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to speedily evacuate friendly-personnel, such as escaped prisoners, from enemy bases. They were deployed to evacuate the revolting prisoners and [[Kyle Katarn]] during the [[Battle of Artus Prime]].

[[File:Freelancecargo.jpg|left|200x200px|thumb|Landed freelance TC9s in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].]]

On a [[Mission to Mos Eisley (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|mission]] to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], Kyle Katarn and [[Jaden Korr]] discovered a couple of TC9s. They would later run into them again, as the mercenaries used them for transporting personnel when they hijacked a cargo tram on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].
